top_signals.title: A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy
top_signals.summary:
In the public perception, it seems like a big deal for Germany to publish a military strategy for the first time. But let me pour a little cold water on that. A form of military strategy has always existed. Where today we have a National Security Strategy paired with a military strategy and Plan for the Armed Forces, the past offered the White Paper, Defence Policy Guidelines, and the Bundeswehr concept, which spelled out the armed forces’ structure in more concrete terms. Yet even the new military strategy, released in late April, reads more as analysis than as a clear

The post A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Disney draws viewer support in deepening fight against Trump administration
top_signals.summary: Media group calls on audience to join its defence against attacks by chair of Federal Communications Commission
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: First Time Buyer ISA consultation
top_signals.summary: The government is publishing a consultation on the implementation of a new, simpler ISA product to support first time buyers to buy a home.

top_signals.title: Kalshi sues Illinois officials over prediction markets restrictions
top_signals.summary: The prediction markets company claimed that it would be “irreparably harmed” when an Illinois law signed as part of a budget package goes in effect on July 1.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
